info.name: Project Sharing CRUD API
info.description: Full CRUD endpoints for Project Sharing Work Orders, Departments, Procedures, Tasks, and Report Forms. All routes are flat under /api/v1/ and scoped by project_type_id query param (index) or request body (create).

query.description: Filter work orders by project type

request.description: List all project sharing work orders filtered by project_type_id.
Get a single project sharing work order by ID.
Create a new project sharing work order. `project_type_id` is required. `code`, `description`, and `type` are optional strings.
Update an existing project sharing work order. All fields are optional (`sometimes`).
Delete a project sharing work order by ID. Returns 204 No Content on success.
List all project sharing departments filtered by project_type_id.
Get a single project sharing department by ID.
Create a new project sharing department. `project_type_id` is required. `code` and `description` are optional strings.
Update an existing department. All fields are optional (`sometimes`).
Delete a project sharing department by ID. Returns 204 No Content on success.
List all project sharing procedures filtered by project_type_id.
Get a single project sharing procedure by ID.
Create a new project sharing procedure. `project_type_id` is required. `code` and `description` are optional strings.
Update an existing procedure. All fields are optional (`sometimes`).
Delete a project sharing procedure by ID. Returns 204 No Content on success.
List all project sharing tasks filtered by project_type_id.
Get a single project sharing task by ID.
Create a new project sharing task. `project_type_id` is required. `code` and `name` are optional strings.
Update an existing task. All fields are optional (`sometimes`).
Delete a project sharing task by ID. Returns 204 No Content on success.

query.description: Filter report forms by project type

request.description: List all report forms filtered by project_type_id.

response.name: 200 OK - List
response.body:
{
  "code": "SUCCESS_WITH_LIST_PAYLOAD_OBJECTS",

request.description: Delete a report form by ID. Returns 204 No Content on success.
List all project sharing tasks settings filtered by project_type_id.

response.name: 200 OK - List

request.description: Get a single project sharing tasks setting record by ID.
Create a new tasks setting record. All three FK fields are required.
Update an existing tasks setting record. All fields are optional (`sometimes`).
Delete a tasks setting record by ID. Returns 204 No Content on success.
